summary: The diff implements fixes for all four requirements. REQ-1 (Grid Preview Table), REQ-2 (Open Orders), REQ-3 (Trade History), and REQ-4 (useQueries.ts audit) are all addressed with proper loading skeletons, error states, empty states, actor-initialization guards, polling intervals, and error propagation. The implementation appears comprehensive and aligns well with all stated acceptance criteria.

hallucinated_features.description: A backend migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added to handle canister state migration between old and new actor shapes.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention adding a migration module to the backend. The constraints explicitly state 'Preserve all existing backend state and data structures; do not alter storage variables or break existing functionality', but adding a migration.mo file and wiring it with '(with migration = Migration.run)' in main.mo goes beyond what was requested — no requirement asked for a migration layer.
